143 D0500C2_STF_TRBL_SLEEP_FREQ_CD D0500C2_STF_TRBL_SLEEP_FREQ_CD D0500C2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Trouble Sleep Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident has trouble falling or staying asleep or is sleeping too much. -=Not assessed/no
